statement: githubRepo is not a built-in VS Code Copilot tool. Referencing it in agent frontmatter tools lists is silently ignored. To access GitHub repository content, use the web/fetch tool category with raw.githubusercontent.com URLs or the GitHub API.
publicSummary: githubRepo appeared in some early examples and AI-generated agent configs but is not a real VS Code tool. Agents referencing it get no error — it is silently skipped. Use web/fetch to read GitHub content instead.
cautionNotes: GitHub may introduce a dedicated tool in the future. This reflects the tool inventory as of early 2026.
